race.comment: TOTTORI (1) was DQ'd fresh after weighing in light but was strong second-up when finishing fast into the placings on the Parks track. Fitter third-up and while he's drawn to get right back again, if the pace is decent he can round them up. AFFAIRE VUE (8) bounced straight back to form last time on the Parks track when chasing gamely into the placings. Gets a key switch in Pannell and rates one of the key threats in this line-up. DIVINE FIRE (5) is peaking now fourth-up and has shown enough early muster in the past to offset the wide draw If they push forward from out there she looks a big chance. CHANCE TAKEN (4) has been warming nicely but leaving it too late in both runs back. Strips fitter and is in the mix if close enough at the turn. GEETEE FORTY (14) lengthened nicely late to grab fourth last start at huge odds. Drops back in trip and gets in well again with the claim. Deserves more respect this time.
